seoTitle: Mount Hutton vs Mount Keira — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Hutton and Mount Keira. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Hutton vs Mount Keira: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Hutton and Mount Keira.
heading: Mount Hutton vs Mount Keira — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Hutton, New South Wales and Mount Keira, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Hutton has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Mount Keira (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Hutton or Mount Keira safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Hutton has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Mount Keira scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Hutton scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Keira scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Hutton or Mount Keira?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Hutton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
